title: Pipeline-Op: GDAXIm/NDXm Cleanup T2-T5 (DL-059 propagation)
description:
## Aufgabe

DL-059 hat T1 von altem GDAXIm/NDXm Symbol-Naming bereinigt. T2-T5 muessen propagiert werden, sobald Pipeline-Op-Team das tragen kann.

Quelle: `_OPEN ITEMS.md` § "Aus Audit 2026-05-08 entstandene Items" — letztes Bullet.

## Was zu tun
1. T2-T5 Custom-Symbols pruefen: Welche tragen noch GDAXIm/NDXm-Naming?
2. Symbol-Rename oder -Loeschung gemaess DL-059 Pattern (analog T1)
3. `bases/`-Ordner NICHT loeschen (Hard Rule HR6 — bases/ niemals loeschen)
4. Per Terminal: Test-Backtest mit neuen Namen, evidence in `docs/ops/QUA-NNN_T<N>_GDAXIm_NDXm_cleanup_<date>.md`

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] T2, T3, T4, T5 sauber von altem Naming
- [ ] Test-Backtest pro Terminal mit neuen Namen erfolgreich
- [ ] Evidence-Doc in `docs/ops/`
- [ ] Closeout-Comment mit Commit-Hash + Per-Terminal-Status

## Pfade
- T2-T5: `D:/QM/mt5/T2`, T3, T4, T5
- DL: `decisions/2026-05-?_dl059_*.md` (Referenz-Lookup)
- Worktree: `agents/pipeline-op`

## Constraint
HR16 — sequenziell pro Terminal. Kein Parallelism (T1 hatte das schon ein Terminal-zu-Terminal-Pattern).

issue.title: Read Company Reference Vault, align Paperclip, and action open items

comment.body:
Blocking QUA-842 after completing DL-059 propagation work and verification.

Completed:
- Removed legacy GDAXIm/NDXm custom-symbol dirs on T2..T5 (history/ticks).
- Verified canonical NDX.DWX/GDAXI.DWX folders remain and HCC topology intact.
- Ran sequential terminal-pinned smoke validation (HR16): T2..T5 × {NDX.DWX, GDAXI.DWX} = 8 runs.

Result:
- 8/8 FAIL with reason_classes=REPORT_MISSING;INCOMPLETE_RUNS.
- report.htm count=0 in all run dirs => NO_REPORT infra class (not EA weakness).

Evidence:
- commit: 5868c7d4
- docs/ops/QUA-842_GDAXIM_NDXM_CLEANUP_T2_T5_2026-05-08.md
- docs/ops/QUA-842_T2_GDAXIm_NDXm_cleanup_2026-05-08.md
- docs/ops/QUA-842_T3_GDAXIm_NDXm_cleanup_2026-05-08.md
- docs/ops/QUA-842_T4_GDAXIm_NDXm_cleanup_2026-05-08.md
- docs/ops/QUA-842_T5_GDAXIm_NDXm_cleanup_2026-05-08.md
- artifacts/qua-842_runsmoke_results.json

Unblock owner/action:
- OWNER: CTO + DevOps
- ACTION: restore MT5 tester report export pipeline on T2..T5 so run_smoke emits report.htm; then rerun same 8-run matrix for closure.
